description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal features a tall, slender, and slightly curved body with a modern design, primarily finished in a soft teal color on the front and white on the sides and back. The front face is dominated by a large, rectangular display screen set into the upper section, surrounded by a subtle bezel. Below the screen, a small payment interface is embedded, likely for card or contactless transactions, and is easily accessible at hand height. The base is wide and flat, providing stability for the upright structure. The sides and rear are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the streamlined, functional aesthetic. This kiosk is designed for public urban environments, such as sidewalks, lobbies, or transit stations, where users can quickly interact for payments or information.
description: A tall, modern self-service payment kiosk with a teal front, large display screen, and integrated payment interface, set on a sturdy white base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen, payment interface, and teal-colored face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the kiosk's curved profile and slim depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, white, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the curved profile and slim depth.
attribute_display_screen: A large, rectangular display screen is centered on the upper front, with a thin bezel and slightly recessed into the kiosk; the screen is oriented vertically and displays a simple interface.
attribute_payment_interface: A small, rectangular payment interface is located below the display screen on the front, likely supporting card insertion or NFC tap; it is flush with the surface and easily accessible.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A small, rectangular area above the display screen contains a digital or printed label, possibly for branding or instructions.
attribute_instructional_signage: A label or text is visible on the display screen, likely providing user instructions or prompts.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small, horizontal slot below the payment interface on the front serves as a receipt dispenser, easily accessible to users.
